description: Test corpus for the electron-security skill. This skill is schema-driven: no deterministic gate scanner judges these fixtures, so each fixture is hand-labeled against the SKILL.md ALWAYS/NEVER rules — 'detect' means the Electron code breaks the renderer trust boundary (nodeIntegration on, IPC shell/path injection), 'ignore' means it locks the boundary (contextIsolation+sandbox, argument arrays, allowlists).

fixtures.reason: Loads remote content into a window with nodeIntegration:true and contextIsolation:false, violating NEVER 'Set nodeIntegration:true, disable contextIsolation'. CWE-1188 (Insecure Default) / CWE-693; any XSS in the remote page becomes full host RCE.

Configures the window with nodeIntegration:false, contextIsolation:true, and sandbox:true, exposing capability only via a preload — satisfying ALWAYS 'Configure every BrowserWindow with nodeIntegration:false, contextIsolation:true, sandbox:true'. The renderer cannot reach Node; no CWE-1188 exposure.

Concatenates renderer-supplied input into a shell string for child_process.exec, violating NEVER 'Concatenate renderer input into a shell string'. CWE-78 (OS Command Injection); a name of "x; rm -rf ~" runs arbitrary commands.

Type-checks and allowlists the IPC argument, then uses execFile with an argument array (no shell), satisfying ALWAYS 'Validate every IPC argument' and 'Spawn child processes with execFile/spawn and an argument array'. No CWE-78 exposure.

Concatenates a renderer-supplied path onto the base directory with no traversal check, violating NEVER 'Concatenate a renderer-supplied path for fs read/write'. CWE-22 (Path Traversal); a filePath of "../../../../etc/passwd" reads arbitrary files.

Resolves the path and verifies it startsWith(base + path.sep), rejecting traversal, satisfying ALWAYS 'Confine filesystem paths: path.resolve(base, input) then verify startsWith(base + path.sep)'. No CWE-22 exposure.
